title: podocarpus brassii subsp. humilis
intro: Podocarpus brassii subsp. humilis is a type of coniferous plant, specifically a small tree or shrub native to the tropical forests of New Guinea. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal activities. The health benefits of Podocarpus brassii subsp. humilis include reducing fever, treating respiratory infections, and alleviating pain, as well as having antioxidant and anti-inflammatory effects. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions, which are often used to treat various health conditions in traditional medicine.
